TimeOfDay_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "781E3C944B8DAF52877E979B94DCA4CE", "Time passes slowly on <Important>Meridian</>, but day will eventually turn to night as the sun sets.
The current <Important>Time of Day</> is displayed in the lower-left of the screen.

As darkness descends, it will naturally become <Important>more difficult</> to expand your <Important>Outpost</>.

You can use <Facility>Beds</> to <Important>Sleep</> and pass the time to a desired section of the day.

Using the knowledge you've gained so far, construct a <Facility>Bed</> within your <Facility>Makeshift Habitat</>.")
